eql.name: reduceExchangeStock
eql.source: update LitemallPointsGoods set exchangeStock = exchangeStock - ${num}, exchangedCount = coalesce(exchangedCount, 0) + ${num}, updateTime = now() where id = ${id} and exchangeStock >= ${num}

eql.name: restoreExchangeStock
eql.source: update LitemallPointsGoods set exchangeStock = exchangeStock + ${num}, exchangedCount = case when coalesce(exchangedCount, 0) > ${num} then exchangedCount - ${num} else 0 end, updateTime = now() where id = ${id}
